title: strobocalyx sylvatica
intro: Strobocalyx sylvatica, also known as the tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dicksoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Strobocalyx sylvatica include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
